title: 40 Silver Age Marvels — Auction Closes Sunday
body:
This is the one serious collectors have been waiting for.

This Sunday at 10pm ET, CBB Auctions closes its largest Silver Age Marvel collection in two years. Forty books. All CGC 8.0 or higher. Starting bids set below recent market comparables.

Why this auction is different:
- 40 books graded CGC 8.0+ in a single event — the highest concentration this year
- Starting bids 30% below recent market comparables for this grade tier
- No extensions. Auction closes Sunday at 10pm ET, period.

Free shipping on all winning bids over $200.

Register and place your opening bid before Sunday 10pm ET.

metadata.preview_text: 40 Silver Age Marvels, CGC 8.0+. Auction closes Sunday 10pm ET.
